case_title: SOUZA INEZ, PH.D. VS BEAULIEW FATIMA C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY SOUZA INEZ, PH.D. AS TO DEFENDANT BEAULIEW FATIMA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUZA INEZ, PH.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAULIEW FATIMA C. $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $229.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
